title: UK REACH authorisation for APPH Limited, 13 December 2024
body: "Decision on an application for authorisation under UK REACH.  Substance name  Chromium trioxide  Authorised use  The use of chromium trioxide for functional chrome plating of aircraft components for civil and military sectors that meet the airworthiness requirements and as hydraulic components for military vehicles.  Holder of the authorisation and authorisation number  APPH Limited (UKREACH/24/24/0)  Date of decision  13 December 2024 "
